zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Umfreville於大約1305年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素時，她的父親Robert Umfraville30歲，母親Lucy Kyme26歲。她於大約1335年與Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年1月6日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Umfreville于大约1305年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德卡素时，她的父亲Robert Umfraville30岁，母亲Lucy Kyme26岁。她于大约1335年与Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年1月6日之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Umfreville was born about 1305, in Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Umfraville, was 30 and her mother, Lucy Kyme, was 26. She married Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland about 1335. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 6 January 1381.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Umfreville est née environ 1305, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Umfraville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lucy Kyme, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland environ 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 6 janvier 1381.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Umfreville um 1305 in Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Umfraville 30 und ihre Mutter Lucy Kyme 26. Sie hat um 1335 Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 6. Januar 1381.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Umfreville è nata il circa 1305 nel Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Umfraville, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lucy Kyme, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland circa 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 6 gennaio 1381.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Umfrevilleが約1305年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで生まれた時，父Robert Umfravilleは30歳，母Lucy Kymeは26歳であった。約1335年にSir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1381年1月6日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Umfreville(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Umfraville(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Kyme(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 1월 6일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Umfreville nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Umfraville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Kyme, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland aproximadamente 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 6 de janeiro de 1381.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Umfreville родилась около 1305 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Umfraville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Kyme, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland около 1335 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 6 январь 1381 г.
